description: Letter from a father to his son. "I heard that you are diligent with your teacher and honoring your mother... My son, you are no longer small. Others of your age are already married. All that I ask of you is to look after your siblings...." He mentions 5 dinars. Greetings to the son's mother, brothers, and sister, and to the teacher who is a ḥaver. (Information in part from CUDL.)
